sentences.translation: Čas crtanja bio je u srijedu.
sentences.translationEn: The drawing class was on Wednesday.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتِ المُعَلِّمَةُ كُلَّ طَالِبٍ وَرَقَةً وَأَقْلَامَ أَلْوَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnica je svakom učeniku dala papir i bojice.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher gave each student paper and colored pencils.

sentences.translation: Zamolila ih je da nacrtaju svoje kuće.
sentences.translationEn: She asked them to draw their homes.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَ نُورٌ بَيْتًا كَبِيرًا بِأَلْوَانٍ جَمِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nur je nacrtao veliku kuću lijepim bojama.
sentences.translationEn: Nour drew a big house with beautiful colors.

sentences.translation: Nastavnica je okačila crteže na zid.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher hung the drawings on the wall.
